# DiabeticDocs

> The single source of truth for the OpenDiabetic ecosystem. Two things: (1) the honest technical
> record of what the OpenDiabetic / LocalDiabetic system IS (the home vault, the PHI-blind reminder
> engine, the on-device edge brain, the PHI firewall, the receipts), and (2) the full, reproducible
> instructions for dev teams to USE our deeded datasets and crockpot-cook diabetic models — the why,
> the how, the doctrine. Open-source, verified, vetted. Every component carries an honest status
> label: LIVE (running and verified), IN BUILD (partly done), FRAMEWORK (designed, not yet a service).

The one law: private health data never leaves the user's box; models flow down, receipts flow up,
PHI crosses never — enforced structurally, not by policy.

Why it's a slow cooker: lives depend on us, truth over compromise. A diabetic acts on the model's
output with their own body, so every cook is 5-cap (premium), deeded, beat-base-proven, and visible.

## Dev guides
- [Overview](https://diabeticdocs.com/): the whole ecosystem in one place.
- [The Why](https://diabeticdocs.com/the-why): why OpenDiabetic is a slow cooker — the founding mission, truth over compromise.
- [The Ecosystem](https://diabeticdocs.com/ecosystem): the surfaces of the house — OpenDiabetic, LocalDiabetic, DiabeticTruth, DiabeticDatasets, DiabeticModels, DiabeticLedger, DiabeticNode, DiabeticDonation.
- [Crockpot Cook](https://diabeticdocs.com/crockpot-cook): the full how-to — clean rig, pull a deeded dataset, canary-then-cook, flightsheet, beat-base, ship. Real commands.
- [Datasets](https://diabeticdocs.com/datasets): find, verify (SHA-256), and pull the deeded corpora. Crystal-clear.
- [The Doctrine](https://diabeticdocs.com/doctrine): the non-negotiables — 5-cap-only, best-in-class-not-budget, clean-rig, crystal-clear, deeded, beat-base-or-kill, visible, firewall.
- [The Firewall](https://diabeticdocs.com/the-firewall): the one invariant and how it is enforced in code.
- [Architecture](https://diabeticdocs.com/architecture): components, data flow, receipts.

## The ecosystem
- OpenDiabetic (the hive — sovereign compute + trust): https://opendiabetic.com
- DiabeticDocs (the docs — single source of truth): https://diabeticdocs.com
- DiabeticNode (the compute — Blackwell fleet, Synology vaults, Jetson edge, the device swarm): https://diabeticnode.com
- DiabeticDatasets (the cookbook — open, deeded datasets): https://diabeticdatasets.com
- DiabeticModels (the builds — show + host): https://diabeticmodels.com
- DiabeticTruth (the cited patient facts): https://diabetictruth.org
- DiabeticLedger (the proof — deeds + hash-chained receipts, audit provenance independently): https://diabeticledger.com
- DiabeticDonation (the give-back — rides, shoes, the continuum): https://diabeticdonation.com
- LocalDiabetic (the healers — home vault + on-device helper): https://localdiabetic.com
